name: Cringegolf
short_description: If you think playing golf is easy, then try playing Cringegolf! Your nerves will be tested, and your composure will be questioned.
detailed_description:
If you think playing golf is easy, then try playing Cringegolf! Your nerves will be tested, and your composure will be questioned.
In this mini golf game, you will overcome obstacles on the way to the coveted hole over and over again. But the obstacle will be not only the partitions and narrow tunnels, but also the ball itself! He will fly wherever he wants, fly past the hole, fly off the field and bring you to a nervous tic. Accept this challenge! Show me who's the boss on the field!
Intuitive gameplay will allow you to start playing immediately. Pleasant concise graphics will not distract and strain your eyesight. Cringegolf is a great game to have fun and let off steam.
